examples.translation: I went to Sanxiantai (in the lesson: 三仙台).
Xiantai in Taitung is famous.
Do you want to visit Xiantai?
We watched the sea at Xiantai.
I like listening to music.
He often listens to music after work.

examples.text: 我們一邊聽音樂一邊聊天。
examples.translation: We chat while listening to music.
This music sounds great.
I usually like to hike.
He climbs stairs to work every day.
On weekends we go climb in the mountains.

examples.text: 小孩喜歡爬公園的設施。
examples.translation: Kids like climbing on playground equipment.
I prefer sports.
He loves sports and runs every day.
She loves sports and often goes swimming.
Do you love sports?
I often go swimming during vacation.
He often goes to the park to run.
We often go walk by the sea.
She often goes to the library to read.
How well do you swim yourself?
He swims very fast.
She swims very easily.
I don't swim very well yet.
I don't swim very well yet.
I swim so-so.
I still need more practice swimming.
I swim better than he expected.
I swim so-so.
He does it so-so.
This exam was so-so.
My handwriting is so-so.
I swim so-so.
He does it so-so.
My handwriting is so-so.
So-so — still need more practice.

examples.text: 我游得馬馬虎虎，還得多練。
examples.translation: I swim so-so; I still need more practice.
Still need to practice a few more times.
Still need to prepare a bit more.
We still need to think it over.

examples.text: 我游得馬馬虎虎，還得多練。
examples.translation: I swim so-so; I still need more practice.
You need more practice to write beautifully.
Speaking needs more practice to be fluent.
Swimming needs more practice to get good.

examples.text: 我游得馬馬虎虎，還得多練習練習。
examples.translation: I swim so-so; I still need to practice more.
Writing needs lots of practice.

examples.text: 每天練習練習就會進步。
examples.translation: Practice every day and you'll improve.

examples.text: 口說要練習練習才流利。
examples.translation: Speaking needs repeated practice to be fluent.

examples.text: 改天我們可以約著一起去。
examples.translation: We can make plans to go together another day.
Let's eat together another day.
Not today — another day.
Chat again when you're free another day.
Good idea! Let's do that.
Do you have any good ideas?
This idea sounds good.
I thought of an idea.
Do you have other interests?
Besides travel, anything else?
He has other hobbies too.
I have other questions to ask.
I really like cooking.
He often cooks dinner on weekends.
Cooking makes me happy.
It's my turn to cook today.
I especially love cooking Italian noodles.
He loves cooking Italian food.
On weekends I often cook Italian noodles.
Do you love cooking Italian dishes?
I especially love cooking Italian noodles.

examples.text: 這家店的牛肉麵很有名。
examples.translation: This shop's beef noodles are famous.
Do you want soup noodles or dry noodles?

examples.text: 他煮了一鍋麵給大家吃。
examples.translation: He cooked a pot of noodles for everyone.
I like taking photos.
Let's take photos here.
He takes photos with his phone.
The sunset is beautiful — take a photo!

examples.text: 我偶爾會拍一些風景照。
examples.translation: I occasionally take some scenery photos.
He occasionally goes hiking.
I occasionally cook for friends.
She occasionally listens to music.

examples.text: 我偶爾會拍一些風景照。
examples.translation: I occasionally take some scenery photos.
This scenery photo is beautiful.
He likes collecting scenery photos.

examples.text: 我們在山上拍了很多風景照。
examples.translation: We took many scenery photos in the mountains.
Have you photographed Taitung's scenery?

examples.text: 我去年拍過很多海邊的照片。
examples.translation: Last year I took many seaside photos.
He's never photographed that area.
We've photographed that place before.
Taitung's scenery is beautiful.
Mountain scenery is relaxing.

examples.text: 海邊的風景在夕陽時最美。
examples.translation: Seaside scenery is best at sunset.

examples.text: 我們慢慢看沿途的風景。
examples.translation: We slowly enjoyed the scenery along the way.

examples.text: 太棒了，我們週末就去臺東！
examples.translation: Awesome — let's go to Taitung this weekend!
This idea is awesome!
That sounds awesome!
Awesome — it's decided!

examples.text: 找個週末我們就一起去臺東吧。
examples.translation: Let's find a weekend and go to Taitung together.
Let's find a time to eat together.
Find a quiet place to chat.
Pick a good day to go out.

examples.text: 我們慢慢欣賞那邊的美景。
examples.translation: We slowly enjoyed the beautiful scenery there.
He likes appreciating paintings.
The sunset is worth appreciating.
Slowly take in the atmosphere here.

examples.text: 臺東的美景真的很漂亮。
examples.translation: Taitung's beautiful scenery is really pretty.

examples.text: 山上的美景讓人忘記時間。
examples.translation: Mountain beauty makes you lose track of time.

examples.text: 海邊的美景適合慢慢看。
examples.translation: Seaside beauty is best enjoyed slowly.
The beautiful scenery here is worth revisiting.

examples.text: 我們先一起把行程計畫一下吧。
examples.translation: Let's plan the itinerary together first.
This trip's itinerary is relaxed.
Day one of the itinerary: go to the seaside.
Once the itinerary is set, we head out.

examples.text: 我們先一起把行程計畫一下吧。
examples.translation: Let's plan the trip together first.
The weekend plan isn't set yet.
Think through the itinerary plan first.
Tell everyone once the plan is ready.
